# Archit Jain — Frontend Developer Portfolio
# https://hiarchit.online/

Archit Jain is a frontend engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web applications
using Angular, React, TypeScript, and Next.js.

Currently: Associate IT (SDE 2) at Daffodils Software (Jan 2022–Present)
Education: B.Tech Computer Science, Kurukshetra University (2018–2022)
Location: India

Key Projects:
- UMANG Web: Pan-India e-Governance aggregation platform serving millions of citizens (Angular, RxJS)
- ITPO Booking: Official exhibition booking platform for Bharat Mandapam / India Trade Promotion Organisation (Angular)
- Anuvachan: Sanskrit/Hindi text transcription tool — 98% manual effort reduction (Angular, TypeScript, AI Integration)
- TalentTrace: AI-powered recruitment platform with intelligent candidate matching (Next.js, AI/ML)

Achievements: 46% dev speed improvement, 150+ reusable Angular components, 15+ projects delivered

Skills: Angular, React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Next.js, Redux Toolkit, RxJS, GSAP, Material UI, React Query, Figma

Contact: architjain808@gmail.com
